---
title: '`syncweaver patch list`'
---

List the patch file records stored in the lockfile for a given tracked source
path.

## Usage

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis
from ccbr_tools.shell import shell_run

help_text = shell_run("syncweaver patch list --help")
print("```")
print(help_text)
print("```")
```

## Examples

```sh
# List patches for a tracked path
syncweaver patch list --path code/mypackage
```
